name: golfgives
description: GolfGives - Golf lottery platform where you win and give back

scripts.start:all: npm run start:backend & npm run start:frontend
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: echo 'Backend is Node.js, no build needed'
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../golfcharity && npm install && cd ..
scripts.env:check: echo 'Backend .env:' && type backend\.env && echo '---' && echo 'Frontend .env:' && type golfcharity\.env
